ChurnPredictionService.description: Customer churn risk prediction using weighted rule-based model
capabilities: Batch predict churn for multiple customers
Recommend retention actions based on risk factors

SalesRecommendationService.description: Sales recommendation using collaborative filtering + rules
capabilities: Get next best action for customer
Cross-sell product recommendations based on history and similar customers
Up-sell recommendations based on usage and tier
Find similar customers for case studies
Predict opportunity conversion probability with market sentiment and competition analysis

SmartCategorizationService.description: Smart lead scoring and customer segmentation using decision tree rules
capabilities: Score leads based on source, company size, title, and engagement
Auto-tag customers based on behavior and transaction data
Segment customers using RFM model (Recency, Frequency, Monetary)

model_type: Rule-based (production can be replaced with ML models)
